modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Printer error messages on HP OfficeJet Pro models.

full_description_text: The user reported issues with their HP OfficeJet Pro 8500 and HP OfficeJet Pro 6978 printers. Upon powering on, they encountered error messages indicating "Alignment Failed" and "Printer Failure." The system prompted them to turn the printer off and on again. The user is seeking assistance due to the persistent error message.
short_description: Printer error messages on HP OfficeJet Pro models.
